allow: Bash(schtasks /Create /TN "XAMPP MySQL PID Cleanup" /TR "C:\\\\xampp\\\\mysql_pid_cleanup.bat" /SC ONSTART /RU SYSTEM /RL HIGHEST /F)

Bash(./mysql.exe -u root -e "ALTER TABLE smatex2.quotations ADD COLUMN terms_conditions TEXT NULL AFTER status;")
Bash(./mysql.exe -u root -e "SELECT setting_key, setting_value FROM smatex2.settings WHERE setting_key LIKE '%bank%';")

Bash(./mysql.exe -u root -e "SELECT setting_key, setting_value FROM smatex2.settings WHERE setting_key='bank_details';")

Bash(./mysql.exe -u root -e "UPDATE smatex2.settings SET setting_value = CONCAT\('Bank: Mashreq Bank', CHAR\(10\), 'Company Name: SMATFLIX TECHNOLOGIES FZCO', CHAR\(10\), 'Account No: 019101904752', CHAR\(10\), 'IBAN: AE080330000019101904752'\) WHERE setting_key = 'bank_details';")
